name: agentcore-harness
description: Configures and runs the 3-agent autonomous coding-agent harness on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime for the workshop. Locked roles: Claude Code = backend (AgentCore MCP server), Kiro = validator (pytest acceptance gate), Codex = frontend builder (chatbot UI). Skills cover per-agent setup/deploy, the gateway MCP, the acceptance gate, and extending the harness. Fire-and-forget orchestration, no race and no winner.
